hero.title: Loan Eligibility Prediction
hero.description: Predict your loan eligibility using machine learning. Enter your financial details below to get a prediction.

descriptions.accountBalance: Status of the applicant's checking account based on current balance.
descriptions.durationOfCredit: Requested loan repayment period in months.
descriptions.valueSavingsStocks: Total value of applicant's savings accounts and/or stock holdings.
descriptions.creditAmount: Total loan amount being requested by the applicant.
descriptions.ageInYears: Applicant's age in years at the time of application.
descriptions.numberOfExistingCredits: Number of active credit accounts held by the applicant.
descriptions.employmentSince: Years the applicant has been in current employment position.
descriptions.foreignWorker: Whether the applicant is a foreign worker or national resident.
descriptions.installmentRate: Ratio of monthly installment to annual disposable income.
descriptions.maritalStatus: Current marital status of the applicant.
descriptions.numberOfDependents: Number of dependents for tax purposes.
descriptions.propertyMagnitude: Applicant's home ownership and property value classification.
descriptions.otherPartyDebt: Whether applicant is guarantor for another person's debt.
descriptions.housingStatus: Current housing tenure status (rent, own, free).
descriptions.yearsAtCurrentAddress: Length of time applicant has resided at current address.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

prediction.summary: Based on your financial profile, your loan application is predicted as {prediction}.
prediction.goodMessage: Your financial profile indicates strong likelihood of loan approval. You are considered a low-risk borrower.
prediction.badMessage: Your financial profile indicates potential challenges in loan approval. You may be considered a higher-risk borrower.
prediction.disclaimer: This prediction is based on historical data and machine learning models. Actual loan decisions are made by financial institutions and may differ from this prediction.

apiError.title: API Error
apiError.message: Failed to connect to prediction API
